chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P. No.D-226 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 03.09.2025 Mr. Sultan Ahmed Chandio, Advocate for Petitioner Respondent No.7 Muhammad Qasim Mangrio present in person Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, AAG along with Asadullah Memon XEN Thar Division Mirpurkhas and Shan Muhammad Mallah, Director Nara Canal. Asadullah Memon XEN Thar Division Mirpurkhas and Shan Muhammad Mallah, Director Nara Canal present in Court undertake that the water to the petitioner’s land as an interim arrangement will be provided from wherever it is possible to be provided through lift machine. The expenses of lift machine will be borne by the petitioner himself. Petitioner is directed to make an application to the Director Nara Canal to permanently resolve the issue of water distribution to his lands. The petitioner along with his counsel shows his satisfaction to the above undertaking and seeks disposal of this petition. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
